summary: Denmark's posture is led by the Centre for Cyber Security, whose theme page explains the transition to quantum-safe cryptography and the migration of Danish organisations to quantum-resistant algorithms. Parliament supports a coordinated European effort, and the central bank advises that preparations for the financial sector should be strengthened. No national migration timeline is attested in the gathered documents.
govActors:
CFCS | Centre for Cyber Security, sets out the transition to quantum-safe cryptography for Danish organisations
SAMSIK | Danish Agency for Societal Security, hosts the transition guidance on its newer domain
Folketinget | Danish Parliament, background note supporting a coordinated EU effort on the transition
Nationalbanken | central bank, advises strengthening preparations for quantum-safe cryptography in the financial sector
